description: Edini Recipe Manager — pure container HDA holding the subnet recipe tree

state.procedural_modeling_notes: 分类容器：程序化建模配方

params.note: All transform/display/picking parms (Object base template) are hidden by the user so the parameter panel stays clean. The 2 visible stdswitcher entries are empty folder tabs (their contents are all hidden) — cosmetic, harmless. The real interaction surface is the Qt Recipe Manager panel, not this HDA's parameter interface.

rebuild_notes.create_recipe_manager: scripts/create via recipe_library.create_recipe_manager() writes .hda to otls/. After manual hide-all-parms in Type Properties, run updateFromNode + save + reloadFile to persist (see git history for the one-shot script).
